name: &cThe &YK&ying's&c Resting Room.&n
description:
You are in a very confortable rest room. Here Azoun cames when 
he is too much tired, to take a long rest or only to meditate. 
There is a bed in the center of the room, with many soft &MPurple 
pillows&n.The walls is nice decorated with pictures of nature,
friends, and his wife, &CThe Grand Mistress of Magic&n. You feel 
an agradable sensation of peace and calm in the room. Amazing 
place to sleep you think...but only if you're a guest of Azoun, 
if not... sorry, but intruders are not welcome.
